purpose: Reduce cold-start context by suppressing low-priority skill exposure in startup routing.

policy.default_behavior: Do not proactively surface these skills during startup or generic routing unless the task clearly requires them.
notes: This list is a startup/routing suppression layer, not a deletion list.
Skills here may still be used when explicitly triggered by the task.
Prefer native tools and high-frequency public skills before considering suppressed skills.

suppressed_skills.name: self-improving-agent
suppressed_skills.reason: Meta-governance skill; useful internally but should not influence normal user-task startup routing.

suppressed_skills.name: feishu-evolver-wrapper
suppressed_skills.reason: Specialized evolver wrapper; not part of everyday task routing.

suppressed_skills.name: echo-skill
suppressed_skills.reason: Smoke-test utility; no need to surface in normal user-facing task selection.

suppressed_skills.name: clash-auto-switch
suppressed_skills.reason: Experimental infrastructure helper; only surface when proxy automation is explicitly relevant.

suppressed_skills.name: notion
suppressed_skills.reason: Integration-specific; keep out of generic startup exposure unless Notion is requested.

suppressed_skills.name: qqmail
suppressed_skills.reason: Mail-specific integration; only surface when email send/read/search is requested.

suppressed_skills.name: tencentcloud-lighthouse-skill
suppressed_skills.reason: Highly specialized cloud skill; should not occupy default startup routing.

suppressed_skills.name: tikhub-api
suppressed_skills.reason: Specialized external API skill; only relevant for explicit platform data tasks.

suppressed_skills.name: komori-sfx
suppressed_skills.reason: Media-specialized effect skill; only relevant inside specific audio workflows.

suppressed_skills.name: pixabay-media
suppressed_skills.reason: Asset-fetch helper; only relevant when sourcing stock media.

suppressed_skills.name: paddleocr-doc-parsing-v2
suppressed_skills.reason: OCR-specific utility; defer until OCR/document parsing is explicitly needed.

suppressed_skills.name: hidream-api-gen
suppressed_skills.reason: Model-specific generation helper; only relevant for explicit image/video generation tasks.

suppressed_skills.name: audio-mixer
suppressed_skills.reason: Narrow media post-processing tool; avoid generic startup exposure.

suppressed_skills.name: sfx-generator
suppressed_skills.reason: Specialized audio generation tool; defer until explicitly needed.

suppressed_skills.name: memory-to-notion
suppressed_skills.reason: Bridge/integration utility; not needed in ordinary startup path.

suppressed_skills.name: feishu-doc-manager
suppressed_skills.reason: Deprecated helper already superseded by higher-level Feishu workflow/native tools.

suppressed_skills.name: feishu-messaging
suppressed_skills.reason: Deprecated helper already superseded by higher-level Feishu workflow/native tools.
